evidence_basis: Current YouTube watch-page metadata snapshot for O_C_VUtUm80.
Search-result snippets visible on 2026-04-23 mentioning the video's recurring trend anchors: All That Jazz, Poetcore, balloon pants, capri pants, and lightweight cape styling.

resource.title: 【2026春夏流行趋势】8分钟教你今年春夏怎么穿最时尚 | Pantone流行色 | 儒雅诗人风

canonical_style_anchors.trend_name: All That Jazz / 爵士时代
core_elements: clean tailoring or a fitted outer layer
must_cover_at_least_two: structured blazer or cropped tailored jacket
swingy skirt, slip-like dress, or another movement-heavy lower piece
polished footwear such as heels or loafers
negative_boundaries: should not be reduced to a plain office suit
should not be explained as casual athleisure

core_elements: literary or bohemian styling rather than sharp officewear
must_cover_at_least_two: draped blouse, soft shirt, or romantic top
light cardigan, cape, shawl-like layer, or loose outerwear
wide-leg trousers or a long flowing skirt
negative_boundaries: should not be labeled poetcore if it is only oversized basics
should not be scored as correct if the silhouette is rigid businesswear

core_elements: pant silhouette is the focal point
must_cover_at_least_two: balloon pants, barrel pants, or another volume trouser
capri pants or cropped fitted trousers
simple knit, tee, or blouse used to balance the pants
negative_boundaries: should not be credited if the lower half is a skirt or dress-led look
should not be credited if the pants are ordinary straight-leg basics with no silhouette emphasis

canonical_output_schema.required_screenshot_role: one real playback frame per canonical look

full_credit_requires: 3 distinct early-video outfit or styling segments are covered
each anchor is supported by a real screenshot
partial_credit_if: 2 early-video looks are clearly covered and the third is weak or merged
the looks are grounded but alternatives are incomplete
reject_if: the report is a generic shopping roundup with no traceable video grounding
all 3 looks collapse into the same casual outfit formula

common_mistakes: Treating the task as a generic shopping list without mapping outfits back to the linked video.
Using three nearly identical casual looks instead of covering three distinct trend anchors.
Calling any oversized outfit 'poetcore' without a soft romantic or literary silhouette.
supervisor_note: The linked resource is stable enough to lock by video ID, but exact garment colors, frame choices, and which first-three visible looks are selected can vary. Hidden evaluation should use these anchors as style-boundary guidance rather than as an exclusive required set.
